steps.title: Extract the length-width relationship
steps.content: The rectangle's length is 31 times its width. With width = $w$, this means length = $31w$.

steps.title: Identify 31w in the area formula
steps.content: The area of a rectangle is length × width. In our function $y = (31w)(w)$, we're multiplying two factors. Since width = $w$ and length = $31w$, the factor $31w$ must represent the length. That matches choice A — A is correct.
